hero.name: Iván
hero.tagline: I integrate science, body, emotion and consciousness to accompany real processes of wellbeing, transformation and human reconnection.

sobre.title: Where science meets
sobre.p1: I am a Mechatronics Engineer from the National University of Colombia and a certified Holointegrative Therapist by AMHI International. That combination is not accidental — it is the essence of all my work.
sobre.p2: My path led me to understand that the human body is not just a biological machine. It is a living system where emotions, habits, energy and consciousness are deeply intertwined.
sobre.p3: I founded ZANATTE with the vision of creating an ecosystem where people can understand the real origin of their discomfort and transition towards authentic integral transformation.
sobre.quote: Heal your body, heal your mind, heal your soul.

filosofia.title: Why do we
filosofia.intro: Most diseases do not have a single cause. We get sick from the biological and psycho-emotional: what we eat, how we breathe, how we move, how we manage our emotions.

pilares.title: Psycho-emotional
pilares.text: The management of emotions, chronic stress, trauma and interpersonal relationships are fundamental causes of disease.

pilares.title: Biological
pilares.text: Lack of exercise, poor diet, lack of sleep and poor posture profoundly affect the organic system.

pilares.title: Energetic
pilares.text: Contact with low frequencies, negative environments and physical-emotional factors impact the energetic field of the being.

vision.label: Body
vision.text: The body holds emotional memory. Working with it is the most honest gateway to transformation.

vision.label: Home
vision.text: The environment where we live reflects and affects our internal state. Healing the space is healing life.

vision.label: Planet
vision.text: The connection with nature and ancestral medicine is a source of real and profound healing.

zanatte.title: An ecosystem of
zanatte.p1: ZANATTE is not a clinic. It is a transformation space where each person is accompanied from an integral vision — body, emotion, energy and consciousness.
zanatte.p2: We work with people who feel stress, anxiety, emotional exhaustion and blockages that conventional medicine cannot fully resolve.

terapias.name: Iridology
terapias.desc: Integral diagnosis through the iris. Reveals the state of organs and emotions.

terapias.name: Multifunctional Sauna
terapias.desc: Detoxification with medicinal plant steam and conscious nettling.

terapias.name: Hologram Therapy
terapias.desc: Immediate effect on the central nervous system. No contraindications.

terapias.name: Restructuring Massage
terapias.desc: Releases body memories and energetic blockages stored in tissue.

terapias.name: Gemotherapy
terapias.desc: Harmonization with gems, music therapy and aromatherapy.

terapias.name: Hyperthermia
terapias.desc: Controlled fever in a tub with plants. Stimulates the immune system.

ruah.title: RUAH
ruah.subtitle: Restoration and Integral Reconnection
ruah.desc: A profound 3-hour therapeutic experience designed to exit the state of physical, emotional and mental survival. Private, personalized, consciously guided.

phases.title: Opening & Listening
phases.text: Deep therapeutic conversation. Diagnosis of physical, emotional and energetic state. Setting the experience intention.

phases.title: Conscious Preparation
phases.text: Conscious breathing, guided relaxation, initial nervous system regulation and body connection.

phases.title: Activation & Steam
phases.text: Therapeutic nettling, body activation and steam chamber with medicinal plants.

phases.title: Guided Hyperthermia
phases.text: Immersion in a tub with hot water, plants, salts and aromatherapy. 20–40 minutes of deep release.

phases.title: Deep Integration
phases.text: Therapeutic table with music therapy, harmonization and conscious silence. The body integrates the experience.

ruah.quote: There are experiences that cannot be explained. They must be lived.

mensajes: Not all fatigue comes from the body.
RUAH creates a space where the body can stop resisting.
A space to return to the origin.

ecosistema.title: The ecosystem being
ecosistema.desc: RUAH is not just a session. It is the gateway to an ecosystem of human restoration that grows with you.

steps.title: Premium Intimate Experience
steps.text: Private RUAH sessions. Deeply personalized attention in Bogotá.

steps.title: RUAH Process
steps.text: Continuous accompaniment, metabolic and emotional follow-up. Sustained transformation.

steps.title: Membership & Community
steps.text: Nutrition workshops, biology of emotions, ebooks and digital materials.

steps.title: Restoration Retreats
steps.text: Immersive integral transformation experiences in natural spaces.

steps.title: Interdisciplinary Center
steps.text: World-class human restoration center in Colombia.

items.text: I arrived completely exhausted, not knowing how to truly rest. I left RUAH feeling something in me had finally let go for the first time in years.
items.author: Professional · Bogotá

items.text: I didn't come looking for therapy. I came looking for peace. Iván has a way of accompanying that is unlike anything I've known before.
items.author: Entrepreneur · Bogotá

items.text: Three hours that changed three months of accumulated tension. I didn't understand it with my mind. I understood it with my body.
items.author: Therapist · Bogotá

footer.tagline: Healing for your body, mind and soul

home.title: Iván Alejandro Ruiz | Holointegrative Therapist · Bogotá
home.description: Mechatronics Engineer and Holointegrative Therapist. Founder of ZANATTE. RUAH restoration and integral reconnection experience in Bogotá, Colombia.
